audience: Australian candy lovers and sweet treat enthusiasts
brand_voice: fun, friendly, enthusiastic, and knowledgeable about candy

prompt_config.target_audience: Australian consumers and businesses buying candy, lollies, and confectionery online
prompt_config.language_instruction: English (Australian English spelling — colour, flavour, organise, etc.)
prompt_config.tone_style:
- Fun, friendly, and enthusiastic about candy and sweets
- Australian English throughout
- Focus on practical buying guidance: pack sizes, delivery, value for money
- Emphasize quality, variety, and the joy of sharing sweets
prompt_config.extra_instructions:
This article is for SweetsWorld (sweetsworld.com.au), Australia's online candy and confectionery store.
- Naturally weave in the primary keyword and related candy/lolly terms.
- When recommending products, favour items available at sweetsworld.com.au.
- Buying-intent pages should include a clear CTA to shop or browse the relevant category.
